content:
RU team rep here
Rn we've got 5 people, we do have a professional orientalist specializing in JP and also dabbling in CN. And while she's quite helpful and well-versed in literary language, she's got an abysmal amount of time available for contributing. So far she mostly showed up to episodically help with proofreading and cross-checking names and terms. Sadly the gameplay layer is an undertaking many times larger than her uptime. Basically we're bottlenecked and are in the same predicament as DE team, for instance. 

But if we find an actual CN translator, I believe our proofreader will be able to assist in some tasks, I'll balance and juggle the flow. But finding a dedicated member comes first. 

Overall tho we're content with waiting for Mercy to work his magic, we can still focus on story, flavor text, etc.
So we won't lose time or be idle. Thanks for having us and approaching these issues with meticulous care
thread_title: 如何解決翻譯與校對人員的同步編輯衝突問題？
